mapper.insert: insert into homework_submit ( homework_id, student_id, submit_content, submit_time, status ) values ( #{homeworkId}, #{studentId}, #{submitContent}, #{submitTime}, #{status} )
mapper.select:
select hs.id,
h.title as homework_title,
c.course_name,
u.real_name as student_name,
hs.submit_content,
hs.submit_time,
hs.grade_status,
sr.score
from homework_submit hs
left join homework h on hs.homework_id = h.id
left join course c on h.course_id = c.id
left join user u on hs.student_id = u.id
left join score_record sr on hs.id = sr.submit_id
order by hs.id desc
